name: perchance-generator
description: Create, validate, preview and run Perchance.ai generators with AI assistance. Supports full .perchance syntax generation, 150+ templates, local preview and live browser execution via Playwright.
author: Gzeu

tools.name: generate_perchance
tools.description: AI-generate a complete .perchance generator from a topic

tools.name: list_templates
tools.description: List all 150+ built-in templates by category

tools.name: get_template
tools.description: Get full code of a specific template

tools.name: preview_rolls
tools.description: Preview generator results locally without a browser

tools.name: run_on_perchance
tools.description: Run generator on perchance.ai via Playwright and capture real results
